title: The Shawshank Redemption
description: Two men build a long friendship while finding hope and redemption through kindness.

title: The Godfather
description: The head of a powerful family business passes leadership responsibilities to his hesitant son.

title: The Dark Knight
description: Batman faces a chaotic rival while protecting Gotham and testing his values.

title: Pulp Fiction
description: Several characters in Los Angeles cross paths in a stylized and nonlinear story.

title: Forrest Gump
description: A kind man experiences major moments in American history with optimism and heart.

title: Inception
description: A skilled dream navigator takes on a complex mission inside layered dream worlds.

title: The Matrix
description: A programmer discovers hidden truths about reality and joins a team seeking freedom.

title: Goodfellas
description: A man reflects on his years in a high-stakes world and the choices he made.

title: The Lord of the Rings: The Return of the King
description: Friends unite in a final quest to protect Middle-earth and bring peace.

title: Fight Club
description: An office worker forms an unusual friendship that leads to unexpected life changes.

title: Star Wars: Episode V - The Empire Strikes Back
description: Heroes regroup after a major setback while Luke begins advanced Jedi training.

title: One Flew Over the Cuckoo's Nest
description: A spirited newcomer inspires patients at a care facility to find their voices.

title: Interstellar
description: A team of explorers travels through space to help secure humanity's future.

title: Parasite
description: A family uses clever planning to enter the world of a wealthy household.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
description: A young investigator seeks insight from a difficult source to solve a major case.

title: Saving Private Ryan
description: A military squad takes on a challenging mission during World War II.

title: Spirited Away
description: A young girl enters a magical world and learns courage, kindness, and resilience.

title: The Green Mile
description: A prison guard discovers that one resident has a remarkable and compassionate gift.

title: Life Is Beautiful
description: A father uses humor and imagination to keep hope alive for his son during hard times.

title: Seven
description: Two detectives work together on a difficult mystery with a symbolic pattern.

title: The Usual Suspects
description: A survivor recounts a complex sequence of events tied to a mysterious figure.

title: Leon: The Professional
description: A young girl and a reserved mentor form an unexpected bond in a tense city setting.

title: City of God
description: In Rio, two childhood friends follow very different paths while growing up.

title: The Pianist
description: A gifted musician relies on resilience and hope during wartime hardship.

title: American Beauty
description: A suburban family faces personal change while searching for meaning and connection.

title: The Lion King
description: A young lion prince learns responsibility and returns home to restore balance.

title: Toy Story
description: Two very different toys learn teamwork while helping each other get home.

title: Finding Nemo
description: A devoted father crosses the ocean to reunite with his adventurous son.

title: Up
description: A widower and a young scout share an uplifting journey full of heart.

title: Coco
description: A music-loving boy explores family history and discovers the value of remembrance.

title: Inside Out
description: A young girl and her emotions learn to navigate big life changes together.

title: The Incredibles
description: A family of superheroes works together to protect their city and each other.

title: Ratatouille
description: A talented rat follows his culinary dream with help from an unlikely friend.

title: WALL-E
description: A curious robot begins an adventure that helps humanity reconnect with Earth.

title: Zootopia
description: A rookie officer and a clever fox solve a citywide mystery through teamwork.

title: Moana
description: A brave teenager sails across the ocean to save her island community.

title: How to Train Your Dragon
description: A young Viking and a dragon form a friendship that changes their world.

description: A young witch gains confidence while starting an independent delivery service.

title: My Neighbor Totoro
description: Two sisters discover wonder and friendship in a peaceful countryside setting.

title: Paddington 2
description: Paddington spreads kindness while trying to clear up a big misunderstanding.

title: The Princess Bride
description: A charming fantasy adventure mixes humor, friendship, and true love.

description: Brilliant mathematicians help advance NASA's missions and inspire generations.

title: The Martian
description: An astronaut uses science, creativity, and teamwork to find a way home.

description: Miles Morales discovers his powers and joins heroes from many universes.

title: Wreck-It Ralph
description: An arcade game character sets out to prove he can be a hero.

description: A lively governess brings music and joy to a family in the Austrian Alps.

description: A man begins to question his routine and follows clues toward the truth.

description: A daydreamer steps into real adventures and discovers new confidence.
